sed -n '759,800p' /app/workspace/otp_src_27.3.2/lib/ssh/src/ssh_connection_handler.erl
grep -n "handle_event(internal, {conn_msg" /app/workspace/otp_src_27.3.2/lib/ssh/src/ssh_connection_handler.erl
sed -n '755,805p' /app/workspace/otp_src_27.3.2/lib/ssh/src/ssh_connection_handler.erl
cat -n /app/workspace/otp_src_27.3.2/lib/ssh/src/ssh_connection_handler.erl | sed -n '755,762p'
/bin/bash -lc "cat > /tmp/fix.py << 'EOF'
with open('/app/workspace/otp_src_27.3.2/lib/ssh/src/ssh_connection_handler.erl', 'r') as f:
    content = f.read()

old = \"\"\"handle_event(internal, {conn_msg,Msg}, StateName, #data{connection_state = Connection0,
                                                        event_queue = Qev0} = D0) ->
    Role = ?role(StateName),
    Rengotation = renegotiation(StateName),\"\"\"

new = \"\"\"handle_event(internal, {conn_msg,_Msg}, StateName, D0) when not ?CONNECTED(StateName) ->
    %% Connection-layer messages must not be processed before authentication is complete.
    %% An unauthenticated peer sending channel/connection messages is a protocol violation.
    {Shutdown, D} =
        ?send_disconnect(?SSH_DISCONNECT_PROTOCOL_ERROR,
                         \"Connection-layer message received before authentication\",
                         StateName, D0),
    {stop, Shutdown, D};

handle_event(internal, {conn_msg,Msg}, StateName, #data{connection_state = Connection0,
                                                        event_queue = Qev0} = D0) ->
    Role = ?role(StateName),
    Rengotation = renegotiation(StateName),\"\"\"

if old in content:
    content = content.replace(old, new, 1)
    with open('/app/workspace/otp_src_27.3.2/lib/ssh/src/ssh_connection_handler.erl', 'w') as f:
        f.write(content)
    print(\"Fix applied successfully\")
else:
    print(\"ERROR: Pattern not found\")
EOF
python3 /tmp/fix.py"
grep -n \"conn_msg\\|not ?CONNECTED\\|Connection-layer\\|DISCONNECT_PROTOCOL_ERROR\" /app/workspace/otp_src_27.3.2/lib/ssh/src/ssh_connection_handler.erl | head -20
sed -n '757,775p' /app/workspace/otp_src_27.3.2/lib/ssh/src/ssh_connection_handler.erl
grep -A4 "define(CONNECTED" /app/workspace/otp_src_27.3.2/lib/ssh/src/ssh_connection_handler.erl
